flags.description: Simulate the execution without changing state
flags.name: --dry-run

flags.description: OpenLDAP image tag for the LDAP demo (default "1.5.0")
flags.name: --openldap-version string

flags.description: phpLDAPadmin image tag for the LDAP demo UI (default "0.9.0")
flags.name: --phpldapadmin-version string

flags.description: Remove OpenLDAP and strip configuration from Vault
flags.name: -d, --disable

flags.description: Deploy OpenLDAP and configure Vault engines
flags.name: -e, --enable

flags.description: Force a clean redeployment of the entire environment
flags.name: -f, --force
